title: rhamnus orbiculata
intro: Rhamnus orbiculata, also known as the Chinese frangula or Chinese buckthorn, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rhamnus orbiculata include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as being used to treat fever and other infections. Herbal preparations of Rhamnus orbiculata include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
